overview:
• Begin your Swiss adventure in the scenic city of Zurich.

  • Explore Lucerne and enjoy stunning alpine views from Mount Titlis.

  • Journey to the “Top of Europe” for breathtaking snowy vistas.

  • Relax or explore Zurich at your own pace.

  • Travel to the romantic city of Paris on a comfortable train.

  • Discover Parisian landmarks and visit the iconic Eiffel Tower.

  • Enjoy a magical day at Disneyland Paris with thrilling rides and entertainment.

  • Shop, dine, or explore more of Paris at your own pace.

  • Bid farewell to Europe with unforgettable memories.

Zurich

Arrive in the picturesque city of Zurich, Switzerland’s financial hub and gateway to the Alps. Upon arrival at the airport, a representative will greet you and assist with your transfer to the hotel. After check-in, take some time to relax or head out for a leisurely walk to experience Zurich’s charming streets, serene lakefront, and elegant architecture. Your Swiss adventure begins amidst a perfect blend of modern vibrancy and natural beauty.

Private Transfer
Cab Transfer from Zurich Airport to Zurich

Best Western Plus Hotel Zürcherhof

Embark on a breathtaking journey to Mount Titlis and the charming city of Lucerne, guided by our expert Travelxploria representative and the best on-ground support staff. Begin by exploring Lucerne's historic Old Town, Chapel Bridge, and the Lion Monument, immersing yourself in the city's rich history. Then, ascend into the heart of the Swiss Alps, where you'll ride the Rotair revolving cable car to 3,020 meters (9,908 feet). Once at the top, experience the Glacier Cave, Ice Flyer Chairlift, and Europe's highest suspension bridge, the Cliff Walk. Revel in snow-capped peaks, thrilling activities, and stunning alpine views on this unforgettable Swiss adventure, brought to you by Travelxploria, the best travel agency.

Mount Titlis and Lucerne Day Trip

​Embark on an unforgettable journey to Mount Titlis and Lucerne with Travelxploria, your trusted travel expert. Begin in Lucerne, where our expert guide and the best on-ground support staff will take you through the charming Old Town, Chapel Bridge, and Lion Monument. Then, ascend into the Swiss Alps aboard the Rotair revolving cable car, reaching 3,020 meters (9,908 feet) for breathtaking panoramic views. At the summit, explore the Glacier Cave, soar over icy landscapes on the Ice Flyer Chairlift, and brave Europe’s highest suspension bridge, the Cliff Walk. With a perfect mix of history, adventure, and natural beauty, Travelxploria guarantees an extraordinary Swiss experience, making every moment truly unforgettable.

Jungfraujoch Day Trip
Ticket Included
Jungfraujoch Day Trip
Ticket Included
Jungfraujoch Day Trip
Ticket Included
Jungfraujoch Day Trip
Ticket Included

Enjoy a leisurely day in Zurich at your own pace, taking time to soak in the city's unique blend of urban sophistication and natural beauty. Stroll along Bahnhofstrasse for some upscale shopping, visit the serene Lake Zurich for a peaceful lakeside walk, or explore the charming Old Town with its historic buildings and quaint cafes. This free day offers the perfect opportunity to unwind or discover Zurich’s hidden gems at your own rhythm.

5
Days in
Paris

Paris
5
Days in
Paris
5
Days in
Paris

After breakfast, check out from your Zurich hotel and proceed to the train station for your scenic journey to Paris. Travel aboard a comfortable high-speed train, passing through breathtaking landscapes of the Swiss countryside and French villages. The journey takes around 4 to 5 hours. Upon arrival at Gare de Lyon in Paris, a representative will greet you and assist with your transfer to the hotel, marking the start of your French adventure.

Shared Transfer

Hotel Riviera

Discover the magic of Paris with Travelxploria, your ultimate travel companion for an unforgettable city tour! Our expert Travelxploria guide will lead you through the heart of the City of Lights, ensuring a seamless and enriching experience. Wander through the elegant streets of Palais Royal, soak in the romance of the Pont des Arts, and admire the timeless beauty of Notre-Dame Cathedral. Stroll through the charming Tuileries Garden, witness the grandeur of Place de la Concorde, and take in the luxury of Champs-Élysées and the Arc de Triomphe. With perfect photo stops at the Eiffel Tower, Grand Palais, and Les Invalides, Travelxploria’s exceptional on-ground support guarantees an effortless and immersive Parisian adventure.

Enjoy a seamless and stress-free visit to the iconic Eiffel Tower with Travelxploria! Skip the long lines with priority access to the 2nd floor, where you’ll be greeted with breathtaking panoramic views of Paris’ stunning skyline. Marvel at the Seine River, Arc de Triomphe, and Notre-Dame from above, capturing unforgettable moments. Whether you visit during the day for a clear cityscape or at night to witness the tower’s dazzling lights, this experience is a must for every traveler. With Travelxploria’s expert guidance and seamless service, get ready for an unparalleled Parisian adventure.

Paris City Tour

Step into a world of magic and wonder with Travelxploria on an unforgettable Disneyland Paris Tour! Explore the two enchanting parks—Disneyland Park and Walt Disney Studios—packed with thrilling rides, spectacular shows, and beloved Disney characters. Marvel at the iconic Sleeping Beauty Castle, take on adrenaline-pumping attractions like Space Mountain, and be mesmerized by dazzling parades and fireworks. Perfect for families, couples, and Disney fans of all ages, this adventure guarantees laughter, excitement, and cherished memories. With Travelxploria’s expert guidance and seamless arrangements, your Disney dream day in Europe’s most magical destination awaits.

A Fairytale Adventure at Disneyland Tour

A Fairytale Adventure at Disneyland Tour

A Fairytale Adventure at Disneyland Tour

Enjoy a relaxed leisure day in Paris, giving you the freedom to explore the City of Light at your own pace. Stroll through charming neighborhoods like Montmartre or Le Marais, sip coffee at a quaint café, or indulge in some shopping along the Champs-Élysées. You may also choose to revisit your favorite landmarks or simply relax by the Seine. This day is yours to savor the magic and romance of Paris your way.

After a memorable stay in the enchanting city of Paris, enjoy your final breakfast and check out from the hotel. A representative will assist you with a comfortable transfer to the airport or train station for your journey back home. As you depart, carry with you cherished memories of iconic landmarks, magical moments, and cultural delights. Though the trip ends, the unforgettable experiences in Paris will stay in your heart forever.

Inclusion / Exclusion

Inclusions

  • Assistance on arrival and departure.
  • Accommodation on Twin sharing basis.
  • All Airport - Hotel - Airport transfers on Private basis.
  • All Tours & activities on sharing basis / Pvt
  • Vehicle will not be on disposal.
  • Daily breakfast at hotel.
  • Mount Titlis and Lucerne Day Trip
  • Full day Jungfraujoch Tour
  • Paris City tour with Eiffel Tower ticket
  • Disney World Tour

Exclusion

  • Bank charges, payment gateway charges.
  • Expenses of personal nature such as Laundry, telephone calls, tips, Liquor, Mineral water, Airport Tax, Insurance, Meal outside hotel etc.
  • Camera Charges.
  • Additional car usage beyond Itinerary.
  • Any supplementary service not mentioned in itinerary as a suggested addition such as water sports or any similar activity.
  • Any other item not specified in "Cost Includes".
  • Additional or incremental expenses arising out of acts of god, political disturbance, strike etc.
  • Any change in government tax structure and amount becoming due thereto.
  • Currency conversion charges.
  • Return Airfare
  • 5% TCS.
  • 5% GST.

rowData.a_details: Step into a world of magic and wonder with Travelxploria on an unforgettable Disneyland Paris Tour! Explore the two enchanting parks—Disneyland Park and Walt Disney Studios—packed with thrilling rides, spectacular shows, and beloved Disney characters. Marvel at the iconic Sleeping Beauty Castle, take on adrenaline-pumping attractions like Space Mountain, and be mesmerized by dazzling parades and fireworks. Perfect for families, couples, and Disney fans of all ages, this adventure guarantees laughter, excitement, and cherished memories. With Travelxploria’s expert guidance and seamless arrangements, your Disney dream day in Europe’s most magical destination awaits.

day_details.day_summary: Enjoy a relaxed leisure day in Paris, giving you the freedom to explore the City of Light at your own pace. Stroll through charming neighborhoods like Montmartre or Le Marais, sip coffee at a quaint café, or indulge in some shopping along the Champs-Élysées. You may also choose to revisit your favorite landmarks or simply relax by the Seine. This day is yours to savor the magic and romance of Paris your way.

After a memorable stay in the enchanting city of Paris, enjoy your final breakfast and check out from the hotel. A representative will assist you with a comfortable transfer to the airport or train station for your journey back home. As you depart, carry with you cherished memories of iconic landmarks, magical moments, and cultural delights. Though the trip ends, the unforgettable experiences in Paris will stay in your heart forever.

inclusions: All Airport - Hotel - Airport transfers on Private basis.
All Tours & activities on sharing basis / Pvt
Vehicle will not be on disposal.
Mount Titlis and Lucerne Day Trip
Paris City tour with Eiffel Tower ticket
exclusions: Expenses of personal nature such as Laundry, telephone calls, tips, Liquor, Mineral water, Airport Tax, Insurance, Meal outside hotel etc.
Any supplementary service not mentioned in itinerary as a suggested addition such as water sports or any similar activity.
Any other item not specified in "Cost Includes".
Additional or incremental expenses arising out of acts of god, political disturbance, strike etc.
Any change in government tax structure and amount becoming due thereto.
